description: Spice up your style with this fashionable, and spacious wallet from fastrack. It's well organised to allow you to carry all your essentials conveniently and it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement.Dimensions : 9 cm x 12 cmMade of brown leatherOne main compartmentTwo insert pocketsMulti card slots insideOne id card holderThe flap has a clasp button closureBrand name appliqued on the frontCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
